rationale: Educ. Code §45.055 governs school district bond guarantee application procedures. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b), so increasing the exemption amount does not conflict.
quote: Sec. 45.055. APPLICATION FOR GUARANTEE. (a) A school district or charter district seeking guarantee of eligible bonds under this subchapter shall apply to the commissioner using a form adopted by the commissioner for the purpose.
_note: No conflict found; rule is unrelated to homestead exemption amounts.
